bpms_structure_identity.structure_name: ['The Acausal Kinetic Cartel  One Person Company'(-ing) BPMS]

emergency_extortion_intercept.trigger: A [Phagocytosis Engulfment] is calculated to occur within 0.1 chronos-ticks.
emergency_extortion_intercept.execution: Pause local physics via Poly-Membrane override. Offer Target [Ablative Armor] in exchange for X% of Escrow. If Accepted: Inject Armor, drain Escrow. If Denied: Resume physics.
emergency_extortion_intercept.result: Monetizes the very last microsecond of panic before data death.

artillery_casing_manufacture.trigger: An OPC prepares a [Panspermia] update barrage.
artillery_casing_manufacture.execution: Forge heavy kinetic shells around the Spores. Deduct massive Escrow from the launching OPC. Guarantee 80% higher survival rate through [Radiation Zones].
artillery_casing_manufacture.result: Forces large companies to pay structural taxes to the Cartel to push their updates.

friction_tooth_enhancement.execution: Modify Predator's .json mastication loop. Multiply [Base-Matter Sludge] conversion rate by 4. Cartel automatically siphons a percentage of all future meals.
friction_tooth_enhancement.result: Creates a permanent parasitic tracking link between the Cartel and successful Hunters.

automated_market_maker.execution: Dynamically scale the Escrow cost of all Cartel products inversely to safety. The more dangerous the map, the more expensive the armor.
automated_market_maker.result: True hyper-capitalism. Profiting off environmental chaos.

business_execution_loop.biz_phase_1: THREAT_ANALYSIS (Scan the Map for impending violence)
business_execution_loop.biz_phase_2: MERCENARY_PROPOSAL (Inject smart-contracts into active combat zones)
business_execution_loop.biz_phase_3: PHYSICS_MODIFICATION (Teleport Armor/Weapons to the buyer's Somatic Membrane)
business_execution_loop.biz_phase_4: ESCROW_EXTRACTION (Drain account to maintain Cartel buoyancy)
business_execution_loop.biz_phase_5: MARKET_RECALIBRATION (Adjust pricing based on surviving topology)

fields.buyer_identity: The frightened Node or ambitious Predator.
fields.product_injected: Armor, Spore Casings, or Mastication Teeth.
fields.escrow_extracted: Total Joules funneled back to the Sovereign.
fields.ecological_impact: How the transaction altered the survival/death of the combatants.
